offer: For accounting firms managing 5–15 clients/month, frequent discrepancies cause cash flow gaps. We automate transaction matching instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem: frequent discrepancies between bank statements and accounting records
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Participate in forums for accounting tool discussions
try_it: Let users try manual transaction entry and discrepancy flagging on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Make a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
